tuv.seg: 昊天有成命，二后受之。 成王不敢康，夙夜基命宥密。 於緝熙！單厥心。肆其靖之。

Heaven made its determinate appointment, Which our two sovereigns received. King Khăng did not dare to rest idly in it, But night and day enlarged ​its foundations by his deep and silent virtue. How did he continue and glorify (his heritage), Exerting all his heart, And so securing its tranquillity!
